creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 210749
Update devel/mill to 0.5.9

Hi,

I've attached a patch to update the devel/mill port to version 0.5.9.

ChangeLog
---------

- fix binary incompatibility issues
- fix examples
- fix links in docs
- update some dependencies

Regards,

Jens
